config.callPurpose: Connect British Airways to my Avios account

root.ivrSpeech: Thank you for calling Qatar Airways. We're currently experiencing a high volume of calls. Which may result in longer wait times. Our teams are working hard to assist all customers as quickly as possible, and we appreciate your patience. To help us support customers traveling soon, if your flight is not within the next forty eight hours, we recommend contacting us closer to your departure.

child.ivrSpeech: Did you know, for faster service, most travel needs can be managed online without waiting for an agent?

Use Qatar Airways mobile app or visit qatarairways.com and use manage booking option to change your existing bookings or request for a refund. You can also check your flight status online at any time. If you still require assistance, please stay on the line and choose from the following options. If you are a member of our privileged club, press 1. If you are a travel agent, press 2. If you are calling with regards to bookings and reservations, press 3.

aiAction.reason: AI selected: IVR menu detected with complete options. Call purpose is to connect British Airways to Avios account, which falls under 'bookings and reservations'. Pressing 3 is the best match for this purpose.
